title: transaction_comps spec
description: Canonical schema for a transaction_comps slide spec. Renders a precedent M&A multiples table. Structurally similar to trading_comps but with different row defaults (each row is a transaction, not a company) and a highlight convention for the most-comparable deal. STATUS: new in v0.2 — not yet implemented by the renderer in v0.1. This schema documents the proposed shape so tools can start producing specs that will validate once the renderer ships.

title.description: Action title (e.g., 'Precedent Home Care Transactions Support a Premium Valuation Range').

header_text.description: Text shown in the navy section header bar. Defaults to 'Selected Precedent Transactions'.

headers.description: Column headers. A typical default set is: ['Date', 'Target', 'Acquirer', 'EV ($M)', 'EV/Revenue', 'EV/EBITDA', 'Premium %'].

highlight_row.description: Zero-based index of the deal that represents the most-comparable precedent (rendered with a highlight). Use -1 to disable.

values.description: Pre-formatted display strings, one per column in headers. Unlike trading_comps where the first column is a dedicated 'company' field, transaction_comps treats all columns uniformly: the first entry is typically the date or target and is included in values.

summary.description: When true, renders as a Mean/Median-style summary row.
